title: Goniopteris minutissima

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate respiratory issues and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Goniopteris minutissima include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties.
